title: 3-D Mach cut-planes
caption: Mach number on five spanwise planes; the interaction weakens toward the finite-span generator edges.

title: 3-D shock iso-surface
caption: Iso-pressure surface tracing the reflected-shock sheet across the span.

title: 3-D heat-flux footprint
caption: Wall heat-flux footprint over the panel: reattachment ridge plus elevated corner heating near the sidewalls.

title: 3-D separation topology
caption: Separation and reattachment lines bow across the span; the bubble is longest in the core and shrinks toward the edges.

title: 3-D streaklines
caption: Near-wall streaklines deflect spanwise toward the centre behind the shock-impingement line — the signature of corner-vortex cross-flow.

title: Spanwise distributions
caption: Separation length and peak heat flux vary across the span; corner heating spikes near the sidewalls.
